query:
-- 1. Mark today's empty plan as skipped (reversible — set status back to 'planned' anytime)
UPDATE dailyPlans
SET status = 'skipped',
    notes  = CONCAT(COALESCE(notes,''),
                    CASE WHEN notes IS NULL OR notes='' THEN '' ELSE ' | ' END,
                    '2026-05-15: marked skipped — no blocks were added for today, fresh start Monday.')
WHERE id = 990001 AND date = '2026-05-15';

-- 2. Show the result so I can confirm
SELECT id, date, dayType, status, LEFT(notes, 200) AS notes_preview
FROM dailyPlans
WHERE id = 990001;

-- 3. Show what next week (May 18-22) looks like, with block counts
SELECT dp.id, dp.date,
       DAYNAME(dp.date) AS day,
       dp.dayType, dp.status,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scheduleBlocks sb WHERE sb.planId = dp.id) AS block_count
FROM dailyPlans dp
WHERE dp.date BETWEEN '2026-05-18' AND '2026-05-22'
  AND dp.isTemplate = 0
ORDER BY dp.date;
